# Figure description: этикетка.jpg

**Source**: `36572_Smolianova_1984/raw_graphics/Список_приложений/этикетка.jpg`  
**Generated by**: claude-sonnet-4-6

---

## Figure Type

This is a **title page / cover sheet** (титульный лист) — specifically the cover of a geological report volume, not a data figure. It is an administrative/bibliographic document serving as the front matter for a multi-volume technical report.

---

## Coverage and Subject

The document covers a **regional geological resurvey (геологическое доизучение) at 1:200,000 scale** across a large number of map sheets in the **M-42 and N-42 series** in northern Kazakhstan. The specific map sheets listed include:

- М-42-XXXIII (126-В,Г; 137-В,Г; 138)
- М-42-XXXIV (128-Г; 139, 140)
- М-42-XXXY (129-В,Г, 141)
- М-42-II (3-В,Г; 4; 15; 16)
- М-42-IV (7-А,Б; 8-А,Б)
- М-42-III; М-42-V (9)
- М-42-VII; М-42-VII (26, 38)
- М-42-IX (29, 41)
- М-42-XIV (51, 52, 64-А,Б)
- М-42-XV

This is the report of the **Западно-Тенизская ПСП (Zapadno-Tenizskaya production survey party)** for work conducted during **1978–1984**.

---

## Key Content

This is purely a cover/title page and contains **no geological data, maps, cross-sections, or figures**. Its content is entirely administrative:

- Identifies the issuing organization
- Names the authors
- Defines the geographic/sheet coverage
- Specifies the volume number and type
- Gives the place and year of publication

The volume described is **Том IV (Volume IV)**, subtitled **«графические приложения»** — meaning **"graphic appendices"** — which would contain all the maps, cross-sections, profiles, and other visual materials associated with the report. This implies that the actual data figures are contained within this same volume.

---

## Research Value

This title page establishes the **bibliographic identity and institutional provenance** of the report, confirming it originates from the Ministry of Geology of the Kazakh SSR under the Tsentrkázgeologiya organization. For a researcher or AI assistant, it clarifies that **Volume IV contains all graphic materials** (maps, profiles, cross-sections) from the 1978–1984 Zapadno-Tenizskaya survey, making it the primary volume to consult for spatial and visual geological data. It also confirms the multi-sheet coverage area and the lead author (Smolianova E.M. et al.), which is essential for correctly citing and locating associated data within the archival collection.
